supported_devices: Gavita e-Series HID ballasts and fixtures (400/600/750/1000W), up to 80 across 2 channels (40 per channel); auxiliary equipment switching via ECM modules
port_types: RJ9 (4P4C) main port, RJ9 (4P4C) aux port, 3.5mm probe jack (T1), 3.5mm probe jack (T2), cage clamp ECM1, cage clamp ECM2, cage clamp alarm NO, cage clamp alarm NC, 5V DC power input
compatible_sensors: Gavita temperature sensor (3.5mm jack, 5m cable); 2 sensors supported
compatible_humidifiers: Any 120/240V equipment via ECM module relay switching (indirect, not closed-loop control)
compatible_co2_equipment: Any CO2 equipment via ECM module relay switching (indirect, not closed-loop control)
recommended_use_note: Dual grow room 12/12 alternating (Inverse mode) or large single room (Follow mode) with up to 80 Gavita e-series ballasts; alarm contacts for external alarm system; original Gen 1, discontinued
uvp_notes: Discontinued product; single retailer listing at 395€, may reflect old stock; GTIN 8718403051742
notes: Original Gen 1 model (product code 60.56.00.xx.xx); uses 100–240V AC to 5V DC adapter (Gen 2 uses 15V DC); dual channel; Follow mode (single room) and Inverse mode (dual room 12/12 alternating); 16x2 green OLED display; light dimming range 50–115%; ECM ports for auxiliary equipment switching (lights-on and lights-off controlled separately); alarm contacts NO/NC for external alarm integration; discontinued, replaced by Master Controller EL2 Gen 2
